temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A high-angle shot reveals a dimly lit interrogation room. Two men are seated at a long table. One man, in a white shirt and tie, sits with his hands clasped, while the other, in a blue denim shirt, looks down. A third man, seen from behind, sits at the far end of the table, facing them. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes the tense and formal setting of an interrogation, introducing the key characters and their positions.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play.)
(00:02-00:04) A close-up shot focuses on the back of the man in the green uniform. His hair is neatly styled, and he wears glasses. He looks down, his face partially obscured by shadow, creating a sense of mystery and tension. (Storyline: This shot introduces the interrogator or detective, emphasizing his serious and focused demeanor.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The suspenseful, low-frequency music continues.)
